# Nashville SEO Content Engine - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This workspace generates SEO-optimized content for mobilemechanicmusclenearme.com using local LLM. Focus on Nashville-area mobile mechanic services with HubSpot integration.

## Content Generation Rules

- Use Nashville-specific terminology (Middle Tennessee, The 615, I-65)
- Include professional and experienced tone
- Minimize fluff, focus on mobile convenience
- Every 300 words needs a CTA anchor
- All HTML must match existing HubSpot CSS classes

## File Structure

- `/prompts/` - System prompts for LLM
- `/schemas/` - JSON-LD templates
- `/config/` - Page generation configs
- `/templates/` - HTML output examples
- `/reference/` - HubSpot CSS guide

## Technical Standards

- Valid HTML5 sections only
- Use classes: .cta-button, .service-card, .hero-text
- Include JSON-LD with every page
- Geo-optimize for: Franklin, Brentwood, Murfreesboro, Hendersonville
